sections.paragraph:
- Original: προσδοκάω

- Transliteration: Prosdokao

- Phonetic: pros-dok-ah'-o

- Definition:

1. to expect (whether in thought, in hope, or in fear)

2. to look for, wait for

- Origin: from G4314 and dokeuo (to watch)

- TDNT entry: 18:05,9

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4314 and δοκεύω dokeuō (to watch); to anticipate (in thought hope or fear); by implication to await: - (be in) expect (-ation) look (for) when looked tarry wait for.
